note: CRA Canada Child Benefit recalculation notice — a tax-credit eligibility change. Government.

input.rawContent:
From: noreply@cra-arc.gc.ca
Subject: Your Canada Child Benefit has been recalculated

We have recalculated your Canada Child Benefit based on your 2025 tax return. Your new monthly amount is $619.40, effective July 2026. View the full notice in My Account.
